next_actions: keep 607 protected until equal gate and trace evidence prove a replacement
decision.reason: The current cut-slot evidence has no seed-safe or reviewable non-anchor same-lane cut for the topdeck targets. Dragon's Rage Channeler remains the cleanest target by prior-result history, but its same-lane slots are hard-blocked.

external_refresh_notes.guardrail: Oracle text does not create a safe cut or prove it belongs in deck 607.
external_refresh_notes.learning: Noncreature spell surveil makes DRC a plausible low-cost topdeck smoothing target.

external_refresh_notes.guardrail: Card-mechanic fit still needs same-lane cut and local trace floors.
external_refresh_notes.learning: Penance can put a card from hand on top of the library, matching Lorehold miracle timing.

external_refresh_notes.guardrail: EDHREC is discovery/provenance, not deck-change proof.
external_refresh_notes.learning: Public Lorehold pages continue to surface topdeck/spellslinger signals.
